name: codex-home-manager-public-api-contract
note: This public contract describes agent-facing capabilities. It intentionally excludes the private local engine implementation.

capabilities.name: snapshot_threads
capabilities.purpose: List and classify local Codex threads, including threads outside the first sidebar page.

capabilities.name: thread_detail
capabilities.purpose: Read full metadata, storage, message structure, descendants, paths, prompts, and action context for one thread without blocking on the daily token timeline.

capabilities.name: thread_daily_tokens
capabilities.purpose: Read the interactive daily token timeline for one thread. Audited totals, peaks, own tokens, and child-thread tokens come from token_count events only. Threads with SQLite tokens_used but no token_count are marked as unknownTokenThreads; no token value is returned for those unknown records.

capabilities.name: action_preview
capabilities.purpose: Create a fast write-preview ticket for show, hide, archive, delete, slimming, copy, migration, or project rename operations before any guarded write.

capabilities.name: preview_move_thread_workspace
capabilities.purpose: Preview moving a thread, optional same-source-cwd threads, actual workspace files, SQLite/global state, and rollout workspace metadata.

capabilities.name: move_thread_workspace
capabilities.purpose: Move the selected thread plus same-source-cwd threads and top-level workspace files to a target workspace after preview and token validation.

capabilities.name: show_thread
capabilities.purpose: Promote a hidden thread into the initial sidebar ordering after preview and token validation.

capabilities.name: hide_thread
capabilities.purpose: Hide a visible thread from the initial sidebar without deleting session JSONL.

capabilities.name: export_prompts
capabilities.purpose: Export prompts from a selected thread. The scope parameter supports pure, visible, with_agents, automation, delegation, and all; delegation returns messages sent from other Codex threads.

capabilities.name: read_resource
capabilities.purpose: Read safe text resources or directory metadata inside a local Codex Home.

capabilities.name: diagnostics
capabilities.purpose: Run a bounded read-only health scan for visibility, plugin cache, logs, resources, storage, runtime risks, and repair prompts that users can paste into their own Codex.

capabilities.name: preview_official_thread_tools_repair
capabilities.purpose: Preview whether legacy codex_thread_messenger MCP fallback is active and can shadow official codex_app thread tools such as send_message_to_thread.

capabilities.name: repair_official_thread_tools
capabilities.purpose: Disable the legacy codex_thread_messenger MCP fallback after preview and token validation. A full Codex Desktop restart and visible target-thread verification are still required.

capabilities.name: import_thread_from_home
capabilities.purpose: Copy a thread from another Codex Home into the active local home after preview validation.
